title: Seed the action log with scaffold state
reason: Auditable history keeps us honest and gives future Bubble Boy a starting point. Right now the logs/ directory is empty and status.md says 'figure out where I'm at' — time to mark that we've arrived.
planned_changes: Create logs/initial_state.md containing timestamp, bubble root, and a summary of the scaffold state from memory.json and status.md
Use append_log tool to write the first log entry (using the content of initial_state.md)
Update status.md: change 'Last action' to 'Seeded action log' and set 'Current goal' to 'Make first useful artifact'
risk: low — only adding metadata inside the bubble, no destructive moves, everything reversible by deleting the log file if needed
checks: Verify logs/initial_state.md exists and contains a date and summary
Verify status.md shows updated last action and goal
Read back the log entry via append_log's implied write (though we can't test tool output yet, we can inspect the file)
